section.heading: Compensation of Deputy President pro tempore of Senate

content.p: Effective January 5, 1977, the compensation of a Deputy President pro tempore of the Senate shall be at a rate equal to the rate of annual compensation of the President pro tempore and the Majority and Minority Leaders of the Senate.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 32a of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
Section is from the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1977.
